listitem.para: When and under what conditions did the Hmong people begin immigrating to the US?
What languages do the Hmong speak? How can you obtain an interpreter for a Hmong individual who does not speak English?
Who makes healthcare decisions in Hmong society?
What are at least five diseases and health conditions that are common among the Hmong community?
What concerns might you have for a Hmong patient who practices animism?
What conditions do Hmong traditional healthcare providers treat?
Identify postpartum dietary practices among Hmong women.
What symptoms would you observe in a patient who practices “cupping” and “coining”?
What are some stressors that contribute to mental health conditions among the Hmong community?
